title: Daewoo Double Electrical Hot Plate, Dual Adjustable Thermostatic Controls, Non-Slip Feet, Compact And Portable With Indictor Light- White
features: CAST IRON - This 2500W hot plate has high quality and durable cast iron heating elements for quick and sustained heating
ADJUSTABLE TEMPERATURE SETTINGS - With it's individual adjustable temperature settings and independent temperature controls this hot plate is ideal for any home kitchen
COMPACT - This hot plate is not only compact for easy storage but also portable making it perfect for home office and dorm usage
NON-SLIP FEET - We built this hot plate with safety and convenience in mind - The feet of this double hot plate are non-slip
THERMOSTATIC CONTROL - Make heating much easier - With thermostatic control from simmering to boiling heating has never been more easy or simple
description: This Fine Elements double hot plate is ideal for home or halls of residence usage With individual adjustable temperature settings and controls you can heat to perfection every time with this handy hot plate as the elements are made from high quality cast iron for quick and sustained heating It's easy to store and take wherever you choose as we've made this hot plate compact and portable too

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Dual adjustable thermostate, Non-slip feet, Indicatore light, Compact and portable, Elegant design
